positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a triumphant fox leaping over abstract, swirling geometric lines. The fox is rendered in a clean silhouette with vibrant orange and deep charcoal accents, contrasting sharply against a deep indigo night sky background. The composition is centered, with strong diagonal lines leading the eye. Use crisp lines, negative space, and graphic elements reminiscent of mid-century modern art meets nature documentary illustration. High contrast, flat vectors, pop art style. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly drawn, messy, cluttered, realistic photo, 3d render, grain
